description: With superb clarity and image quality, the RSPB Skylark is a fantastic starter binocular. The entry-level model is fully waterproof and nitrogen-filled for clear views in all weather. It has rubber twist-up eyecups and includes case, neck strap and caps. Lightweight and ergonomic for long-term use.
key_features: Supplied with case, neck strap and caps
product_page_blurb: Entry-level, waterproof and nitrogen-filled binoculars with comfortable twist-up eyecups. Supplied with a case, neck strap and protective caps.
product_page_key_features: Entry-level model with clear, bright views
Waterproof and nitrogen-filled to reduce fogging
Twist-up eyecups for glasses and non-glasses users
Supplied with case, strap and protective caps

value_for_money: Traditional wide-field binoculars offering excellent value
description: RSPB ASW 8x40 binoculars are a traditional porro-prism binocular with aspheric multi-coated lenses for a clear bright image at an affordable price. Rubber-covered body for protection and grip, and twist-down eyecups for spectacle wearers.
key_features: Rubber-covered body for protection and grip
product_page_blurb: Traditional porro-prism binoculars designed for a bright, clear image at a low price, with a rubberised body for grip and protection and twist-down eyecups for spectacle wearers.
product_page_key_features: Aspheric multi-coated lenses for a clear, bright view
Rubberised body for grip and protection

value_for_money: Strong mid-range value in a lighter format
description: The flagship RSPB Avocet range are great value, mid-level, high-quality binoculars. A step up from Skylark, with robust construction, full waterproofing, nitrogen-filled design, BAK-4 prisms, fully multi-coated optics, and a five-year warranty.
key_features: Wider padded neck strap and better carry bag
product_page_blurb: Mid-level binoculars designed as a step up in build and optics, with BaK-4 prisms, fully multi-coated lenses, full waterproofing and nitrogen filling. Comes with a better carry bag and a wider padded strap.
product_page_key_features: BaK-4 prisms and fully multi-coated lenses
Supplied with case and padded strap

value_for_money: Strong value for a lighter carry
description: With fully multi-coated lenses and BAK-4 prisms, Harrier binoculars deliver good brightness and clarity for all-round birding. They are waterproof and nitrogen-filled, with close focus below 2m, thumb-holds for grip, and a 10-year warranty.
product_page_blurb: Well-rounded birding binoculars with waterproof, nitrogen-filled construction and a balance of handling and field of view for general use. Designed as a solid upgrade path within the RSPB range.
product_page_key_features: Wide field of view options depending on model

value_for_money: Premium performance in a lighter, more compact format
description: Harrier X adds ED glass, phase-corrected prisms and dielectric coating for a brighter, higher-contrast image, while keeping the rugged waterproof/nitrogen-filled build and wide field of view.
key_features: Magnesium alloy body with rubber armour and thumb holds
product_page_blurb: Feature-rich binoculars in a compact, shock-protected body, using ED glass plus phase correction and dielectric prism coatings for a bright, high-contrast image with reduced colour fringing. Very close focusing and a wide field of view make them great for birds and insects.
product_page_key_features: ED glass with phase correction to reduce colour fringing
Dielectric-coated prisms for a brighter image
Wide field of view and close focus (around 2 m)
Magnesium alloy body with rubber armour and thumb holds

value_for_money: Premium RSPB optics with outstanding edge-to-edge clarity
description: Buzzard binoculars use ED lenses plus phase- and dielectric-coated, high-transmittance prisms for a bright, sharp image. Field-flattening lenses keep the image sharp to the edge. Waterproof and nitrogen-filled with a 10-year warranty.
key_features: Includes strap, case, objective caps and rainguard
product_page_blurb: High-performance binoculars with ED lenses, high-transmission prisms with phase and dielectric coatings, plus field-flattening lenses for sharpness to the edge. Waterproof, nitrogen-filled, and supplied with strap, case, objective caps and rainguard.
product_page_key_features: ED lenses for improved colour and detail
Phase-coated, high-transmission prisms with dielectric coatings
Supplied with strap, case, caps and rainguard

value_for_money: Flagship RSPB binoculars with exceptional clarity and low-light performance
description: Sparrowhawk is the flagship model in the RSPB binocular range, built around a lightweight, robust magnesium body with Japanese optics. Phase- and SHR-coated Schmidt-Pechan prisms and flat-field multi-coated ED lenses deliver bright, crystal-clear viewing and strong low-light performance. Supplied with accessories and a 10-year warranty.
key_features: Flagship model in the RSPB range
Phase and SHR coated Schmidt-Pechan prisms
Bright, crystal-clear viewing with strong low-light performance
Includes rain guard, objective caps, neoprene strap and case
product_page_blurb: Flagship RSPB binoculars built around Japanese optics in a magnesium body. Uses ED lenses and coated Schmidt–Pechan prisms for a very bright image, strong low-light performance and sharpness across the field.
product_page_key_features: ED lenses with flat-field design for edge-to-edge sharpness
Phase + SHR coated Schmidt–Pechan prisms for brightness
Lightweight magnesium body and smooth focusing
Supplied with rainguard, caps, neoprene strap and case
